definition.en: You are always and constantly in the process of transforming energy from the inner senses into physical idea constructions.
definition.zh: 你始终且持续地处于将来自内在感官的能量转化为物质性理念建构的过程中。

definition.en: The error is one of inadequate idea construction.
definition.zh: 这个错误在于理念建构的不充分。

definition.en: One of Ruburt's little prize perceptions was his realization that you see, or are aware of, only your own idea constructions.
definition.zh: 鲁柏的一个珍贵领悟是，他认识到你只看到或意识到你自己的理念建构。

definition.en: Basically each individual inhabits a completely different world.
definition.zh: 基本上，每个个体都居住在一个完全不同的世界里。

explanation:
意念建构的核心含义是：每个人感知到的外部世界并非客观现实本身，而是自己心智创造的主观版本。你看到的沙发、桌子、甚至整个物质宇宙，都是你个人意念的投射。不同的人虽然可以就“沙发在这里”达成共识，但每个人实际感知的是不同的意念建构。这种建构基于你的信念、情感和思想，并通过心电感应与他人协调，形成看似一致的集体现实。

关键在于：既然现实是意念建构，那么改变你的主观感受和信念，就能直接改变你的环境和处境。当你意识到这一点，就不再感到无力，因为你掌握了塑造现实的能力。精神失衡的人，往往只是其个人现实的建构方式与他人无法找到相似之处。因此，理解意念建构的本质，是掌握自我创造和改变生活的钥匙。

quotes.text: (To Mary and Art): You each generally agree, I am sure, that you sit upon a couch. You do not perceive the same couch. You only perceive your own idea constructions. You cannot see those of another. Telepathically, you transpose your ideas in line with what you know of the other person's thinking. You agree that the couch is here. Now it is true that within your physical system -- for I know this will come next -- you can measure your couch. I expect at any moment that someone will get a ruler and measure it, and then say to me that the couch is so long: How can I say it is not one couch?
quotes.translation: （对玛丽和阿特说）：我确信你们大致都同意自己正坐在一张沙发上。但你们感知到的并非同一张沙发，你们只感知到自己的意念建构。你们无法看见他人的意念建构。通过心电感应，你们会根据自己对他人思维的理解来转译自己的意念。你们同意沙发在这里。现在，在你们的物质系统内——因为我知道接下来会有人提出这点——你们确实可以测量这张沙发。我随时都预料会有人拿尺子来量它，然后对我说沙发有多长：我怎能说它不是同一张沙发呢？
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: You can readily see, therefore, how important your subjective feelings really are. This knowledge -- that your universe is idea construction -- can immediately give you clues that enable you to change your environment and circumstances beneficially. When you do not understand the nature of the soul, and do not realize that your thoughts and feelings form physical reality, then you feel powerless to change it. In later chapters of this book, I hope to give you some practical information that will enable you to alter practically the very nature and structure of daily life.
quotes.translation: 因此你们很容易看出，你们的主观感受有多么重要。这个认知——即你们的宇宙是意念建构——能立即提供线索，使你们得以有益地改变自身环境和处境。当你们不了解灵魂的本质，不明白思想和情感形成物质实相时，就会感到无力改变它。在本书后续章节中，我希望提供一些实用信息，让你们能够实际改变日常生活的本质与结构。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: That event resulted in a scribbled manuscript, unpublished, called The Physical Universe as Idea Construction. His desire and intense intent to understand more of the nature of reality triggered the production of that fragmentary automatic manuscript. He found himself as a young adult, at the time of the President Kennedy assassination, in a world that seemed to have no meaning. At the same time, while conditioned by the beliefs of his generation -- beliefs that still tinge your times -- he held on to one supporting belief never completely lost from childhood.
quotes.translation: 那个事件导致了一份潦草的手稿，未出版，名为《物质宇宙即意念建构》。他渴望并强烈意图更深入了解实相的本质，这触发了那份零散的自动手稿的产生。在肯尼迪总统遇刺时期，作为年轻成人的他发现自己身处一个似乎毫无意义的世界。同时，在受其世代信念影响——这些信念仍为你们时代染上色彩——他坚守着一个自童年起从未完全失去的支撑性信念。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title:
SESSION 824, MARCH 1, 1978
9:40 P.M. WEDNESDAY
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: (11:02.) Give us a moment ... I told you (in the last session) that in one probability Ruburt was a nun, expressing mysticism in a highly disciplined context, where it must be watched so that it does not get out of hand. Because there is an unconscious flow of information and experience here, you have one of the reasons for Ruburt's caution in some psychic matters, and his fear of leading people astray. There were three offshoots: one, the nun, with mysticism conventionally expressed, but under guarded circumstances; one, the writer who veiled mystical experience through art; and one, the Ruburt you know, who experienced mystical experience directly, teaches others to do the same, and forms through writing a wedding of the two aspects. You have known two of those selves, then, and you were present at Ruburt's birth with Idea Construction.
quotes.translation: （11点02分。）给我们一点时间……我告诉过你们（在上节课中），在某个可能性中，鲁柏曾是一位修女，在高度纪律化的环境中表达神秘主义，这种表达必须受到监控以防失控。由于这里存在着无意识的信息与经验流动，你们便有了鲁柏在某些通灵事务上保持谨慎、以及害怕误导他人的原因之一。曾有三个分支：其一，那位修女，以传统方式表达神秘主义，但在受保护的环境下；其二，那位通过艺术遮掩神秘体验的作家；其三，你们所认识的鲁柏，他直接体验神秘体验，教导他人也这样做，并通过写作将这两个面向结合。那么，你们已经认识了其中两个自我，而鲁柏出生时你们也在场，伴随着意念建构。

source_raw.title: SESSION 680
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: The poetry has always been the result of facility in use of the inner senses, but until lately he was unable to give this sufficient pattern in terms of unitary form. His efforts in the book The Physical World as Idea Construction represented a breakthrough on his part. He realized, I believe, from the beginning that the conscious critical mind had little to do with the initial conception.
quotes.translation: 诗歌始终是内在感官运用自如的结果，但直到最近，他才能以统一形式赋予其充分模式。他在《物质世界即意念建构》一书中的努力代表了他个人的突破。我相信他从一开始就意识到，有意识的批判性心智与最初的构思几乎无关。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Here you can get the feel of them so that you know what you are working with. You are always and constantly in the process of transforming energy from the inner senses into physical idea constructions. I want you to become acquainted with the process by which you accomplish this unknowingly, so that you can then perform the same feats with your own awareness.
quotes.translation: 在此你们能感受到它们，从而知道自己正在处理什么。你们始终不断地将来自内在感官的能量转化为物质性的意念建构。我希望你们熟悉自己不知不觉完成这一过程的方式，这样你们就能有意识地完成同样的壮举。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: We have discussed the ways in which telepathy operates in this respect, and we have to some extent discussed the ways in which the appearance of cohesiveness is maintained. In many cases the individual who is called mentally unbalanced is simply one whose individual reality is so composed that it is impossible for others to find in his expression of it any similarity with their own. The error is one of inadequate idea construction.
quotes.translation: 我们讨论过心电感应在此方面的运作方式，也一定程度探讨了表面凝聚性如何维持。许多被视为精神失衡的个体，其个人现实构成方式使他人无法在其表达中找到与自身经验的相似性。这种错误源于不恰当的观念建构。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Information like this is sifted through many layers of subconscious conception, and is subsequently colored. People believing in your organized religions color it in a manner that is highly disadvantageous, and that unfortunately adds to existing superstitions. Ruburt's mind, believe it or not, is much like my own -- though, if you'll forgive me, in a very limited fashion. Therefore the distortions are much less distortive, much less harmful, and more easily discovered and cleared ... Others less perfectionist than myself are content with more distortion. I am not. Ruburt's Idea Construction9 was rather amazing. The inner senses provided him with much, but nevertheless the ideas contained in it represented an achievement of the conscious mind. I was drawn by this to realize that he was ready for me.
quotes.translation: 此类信息需经过多层潜意识概念过滤，随后被着色。信奉你们组织化宗教的人会以极为不利的方式着色，不幸地助长了既有迷信。信不信由你，鲁柏的心智与我的颇为相似——尽管请恕我直言，是以极为有限的方式。因此其扭曲程度较轻、危害较小，且更易被发现与清除... 较我而言不那么完美主义的人对更多扭曲感到满足，而我不会。鲁柏的《观念建构》相当惊人。内在感官虽赋予他许多，但其中蕴含的观念仍是意识心智的成就。正是这点让我意识到他已准备好接受我。

source_raw.title: (However, from Session 14 [for January 8, 1964], there's other material that can be given here, as well as some that makes an interesting note at the end of this appendix.4 First, from my own note at 11:05: "Jane said that Seth was quite pleased with the new voice, and that she now knows what he's thinking sometimes, even though he doesn't relay it to or through her as part of a message."
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: One of Ruburt's little prize perceptions was his realization that you see, or are aware of, only your own idea constructions. Basically each individual inhabits a completely different world. We will carry this further.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏的珍贵洞见之一，是认识到你只能看见或觉察自己的观念建构。基本上每个个体都栖居于全然不同的世界。我们将对此进一步探讨。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json
